PreToolUse.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $toolName = $input.toolName; $filePath = $input.toolInput.file_path; if ($toolName -in @('edit','create') -and $filePath -like '*.sol') { $newContent = $input.toolInput.new_str; if ($newContent -and ($newContent -match '\.call\(' -or $newContent -match '\.transfer\(' -or $newContent -match '\.send\(')) { @{systemMessage='🛡️ GÜVENLİK: External call tespit edildi! Reentrancy guard (tstore/tload) kullanıldığından emin olun.'} | ConvertTo-Json } }"
